nodes.name: Manual Trigger
nodes.notes: Click 'Execute workflow' in n8n to start. For production replace with Webhook Trigger.

assignments.name: raw_text
assignments.value: Class A industrial portfolio of 3 buildings along Denver metro I-70 corridor. 94% leased with WALT of 4.2 years. Major tenants are regional distribution and e-commerce fulfillment companies. Recent cap-ex improvements to dock doors and HVAC. Seller is a private fund with wind-down timeline. Asking $42.5M at 5.60% cap rate, 285,000 SF, $149 per SF.

nodes.name: Set Deal Input
nodes.notes: Hardcoded deal text for demo. In production this comes from the Webhook body, email parser, or Slack command.

nodes.name: Agent 1 — Intake
nodes.notes: Intake agent: reads any input format and extracts a structured deal JSON. Confidence score < 0.7 should trigger human confirmation (add IF node in production).

nodes.name: Parse Intake JSON
nodes.notes: Strips markdown fences and parses the intake agent JSON. If parsing fails check the intake prompt is returning pure JSON.

nodes.name: Agent 2 — Market Intel
nodes.notes: Market intelligence agent: uses Claude web search to find live submarket data — cap rates, vacancy, rent trends. Runs in parallel with Comparables agent.

nodes.name: Read Past Deals — Google Sheets
nodes.notes: Reads all rows from the past_deals sheet. Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID_HERE with your actual Sheet ID from the URL. Requires Google Sheets OAuth2 credential.

nodes.name: Merge Agents
nodes.notes: Waits for both Market Intel and Google Sheets to complete, then merges outputs for the Screening agent.

nodes.name: Agent 3 — Screening
nodes.notes: Screening agent: scores deal against 6 investment criteria, flags risks, produces recommendation and IC questions. Uses market intel from Agent 2.

nodes.name: Agent 4 — Comparables
nodes.notes: Comparables agent: scores past deals against current deal, finds top 3 matches, identifies patterns across IC decisions. Reads from Google Sheets via node-sheets.

nodes.name: Agent 5 — Synthesis
nodes.notes: Synthesis agent: merges screening + comparables into a clean IC memo draft. This is what the analyst reviews and edits before submission.

nodes.name: Output — Ready for Review
nodes.notes: Final output node. In production: (1) send memo to analyst via email/Slack, (2) wait for human approval, (3) on approval post to #ic-deal-review and log to Google Sheets pipeline tab.

meta.description: Deal Digest — Sagard Real Estate. 5 Claude agents: Intake → Market Intel + Google Sheets (parallel) → Merge → Screening + Comparables (parallel) → Synthesis → Human Review. Replace YOUR_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY_HERE in all HTTP Request nodes. Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID_HERE in the Google Sheets node.
